attributes.action: Introduce badges to park in parent and child bays
attributes.additional_details: Too many people park in these bays without children
attributes.background: To make badges (similar to disabled badge) specifically for parent and child bay parking. Only people who apply and successfully get a badge must display to park in the bays.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Family parking space badges for children up to 5 & fines for illegitimate use" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758169
